/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/instance.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/device.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/present.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/cmdbuffer.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/renderpass.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/nebula.dir/main.c.o -o nebula  /usr/lib64/libvulkan.so /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.4
